TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O Sowal no Kuwaping hananay i, o Kuwaping a sowal. Ira ko 'alomanay to tamdaw a Kuwaping i Congko. Tangasa to i 2015 a mihcaan i, ira to ko 13.4 'ok a tamdaw somowalay to Kuwaping a sowal i hkal ma^min.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ko~u~uwapiŋ ħananaj i, o~u ko~u~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ. ira ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a ko~u~uwapiŋ i ʦo~uŋko~u. taŋasa to~u i **** a miħʦaan i, ira to~u ko~u **.* ʡo~uk a tamɬ~ɮaw so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u ko~u~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ i ħkaɾ maʔmin.
S.FORM: O Sowal no Kuwaping hananay i, o Kuwaping a sowal. Ira ko 'alomanay to tamdaw a Kuwaping i Congko. Tangasa to i 2015 a mihcaan i, ira to ko 13.4 'ok a tamdaw somowalay to Kuwaping a sowal i hkal ma^min.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ko~u~uwapiŋ ħananaj i, o~u ko~u~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ. ira ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a ko~u~uwapiŋ i ʦo~uŋko~u. taŋasa to~u i **** a miħʦaan i, ira to~u ko~u **.* ʡo~uk a tamɬ~ɮaw so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u ko~u~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ i ħkaɾ maʔmin.
